title: Debug a Flask app with a NameError

content.problemStatement:
In this practice problem, you'll debug a Flask application that has a NameError. \
This is a common issue that occurs when you try to use a variable or function that hasn't been defined. 

### Task
1. Run the Flask application.
2. Observe the error message in the console.
3. Identify the type of error and where it occurs.
4. Fix the error in the code.
5. Run the application again to verify the fix.

When the code is fixed - we need to get the following output on the webpage. Remember about the space and expressions in the output.
```python
Hello, World!
```

Click on 'Run' to view the webpage. \
Click on 'Submit' to check if your code is correct.
